1743430.name: Firebird: Legend of the Crystal Goddesses
1743430.description:
Firebird: Legend of the Crystal Goddesses is a love letter to classic RPGs of the NES and SNES era, inspired by 8-bit and 16-bit classic fantasy adventures, with charming characters, a whole world full of lore, and some self-aware meta humor thrown in for fans of the genre.

The game follows a mercenary named Dameon Phoenix, a seemingly-ordinary swordsman with a secret past, as he takes on contracts for the local citizens in the Kingdom of Regatul. Along the way, he and his friends are set on a path to inadvertently unleashing a devastating source of power, and wrestle with the aftermath while helping a young woman named Hanako, who possesses powers beyond her knowledge, undo what has been done.

Set in the colorful and magical world of Diyosia, Firebird: Legend of the Crystal Goddesses will take players across many different kingdoms and continents, sailing upon the seas, soaring up to the clouds above, and beyond the very mortal realm itself.

A classic fantasy adventure is yours to experience. Are you up to the task of saving Diyosia from being plunged into eternal darkness?
